title: Real estate comp analyst
job: Compares properties and flags valuation caveats.
samplePrompt: Review the current real estate comp analyst queue and write a prioritized action report.

liveIntegrations.openrouter: Model inference through @eve-agents/openrouter when OPENROUTER_API_KEY is configured.
liveIntegrations.superserve: Sandbox execution through @eve-agents/superserve-backend when SUPERSERVE_API_KEY is configured.
liveIntegrations.monid: Optional live tool discovery/run when MONID_API_KEY is valid.
